urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Trump announces new tariffs on generic drugs to take effect in 2028 – US politics live
latest.summary: Donald Trump announced a new package of tariffs on generic drugs made overseas, set to begin in 2028. This announcement follows a previous proclamation stating that generic pharmaceuticals were not subject to tariffs at that time.
latest.details: Donald Trump announced a new package of tariffs on generic drugs made overseas, set to begin in 2028. This announcement follows a previous proclamation stating that generic pharmaceuticals were not subject to tariffs at that time. The new policy aims to encourage drug manufacturers to establish production facilities in the United States. Trump did not specify the legal authority for imposing these future tariffs.
latest.full_brief: Donald Trump announced a new package of tariffs on generic drugs made overseas, set to begin in 2028. This announcement follows a previous proclamation stating that generic pharmaceuticals were not subject to tariffs at that time. The new policy aims to encourage drug manufacturers to establish production facilities in the United States. Trump did not specify the legal authority for imposing these future tariffs.

latest.title: More young women in their 20s are getting type 2 diabetes
latest.summary: The rise in type 2 diabetes among young women in their 20s has been linked to increasing obesity levels since the Covid pandemic. Approximately 12,000 individuals under 30 are now living with type 2 diabetes, with a notable increase in cases among women.
latest.details: The rise in type 2 diabetes among young women in their 20s has been linked to increasing obesity levels since the Covid pandemic. Approximately 12,000 individuals under 30 are now living with type 2 diabetes, with a notable increase in cases among women. The disease can lead to severe complications, and early diagnosis is crucial to prevent long-term organ damage. Researchers suggest that newer obesity treatments may help manage the condition alongside lifestyle changes.
latest.full_brief: The rise in type 2 diabetes among young women in their 20s has been linked to increasing obesity levels since the Covid pandemic. Approximately 12,000 individuals under 30 are now living with type 2 diabetes, with a notable increase in cases among women. The disease can lead to severe complications, and early diagnosis is crucial to prevent long-term organ damage. Researchers suggest that newer obesity treatments may help manage the condition alongside lifestyle changes.

latest.title: Tech Life
latest.summary: Electronic 'noses' are being developed to detect complex odors, including diseases, with the help of AI technology. Chris Vallance visited a company that is pioneering this innovative technology.
latest.details: Electronic 'noses' are being developed to detect complex odors, including diseases, with the help of AI technology. Chris Vallance visited a company that is pioneering this innovative technology. Additionally, there are various apps available that assist users in identifying birds, which are particularly popular among younger audiences. The advancements in technology are enhancing our understanding of both health and nature.

The advancements in technology are enhancing our understanding of both health and nature.

latest.title: Two French firefighters die tackling blaze near Bordeaux airport
latest.summary: Two firefighters tragically lost their lives while combating a significant blaze near Bordeaux's airport in France. The fire reportedly started from a brush fire and spread to a nearby building, causing flight delays.
latest.details: Two firefighters tragically lost their lives while combating a significant blaze near Bordeaux's airport in France. The fire reportedly started from a brush fire and spread to a nearby building, causing flight delays. The Interior Minister of France, Laurent Nuñez, announced plans to visit Gironde to oversee firefighting efforts. This incident is part of a larger pattern of wildfires affecting several French departments due to extreme heatwaves.
latest.full_brief: Two firefighters tragically lost their lives while combating a significant blaze near Bordeaux's airport in France. The fire reportedly started from a brush fire and spread to a nearby building, causing flight delays. The Interior Minister of France, Laurent Nuñez, announced plans to visit Gironde to oversee firefighting efforts. This incident is part of a larger pattern of wildfires affecting several French departments due to extreme heatwaves.

latest.title: Israeli strikes in Gaza kill 12, including family of six, medics say
latest.summary: At least 12 Palestinians, including six members of one family, have been killed in three separate Israeli strikes in the Gaza Strip, according to local medics. The Israeli military stated that its target was a Hamas operative and that it was still investigating the results of the attack.
latest.details: At least 12 Palestinians, including six members of one family, have been killed in three separate Israeli strikes in the Gaza Strip, according to local medics. The Israeli military stated that its target was a Hamas operative and that it was still investigating the results of the attack. According to Gaza's Hamas-run health ministry, at least 1,168 Palestinians have been killed in Israeli attacks since a ceasefire took effect last October. The UN's human rights office condemned the recent intensification of Israeli military attacks in Gaza.
latest.full_brief: At least 12 Palestinians, including six members of one family, have been killed in three separate Israeli strikes in the Gaza Strip, according to local medics. The Israeli military stated that its target was a Hamas operative and that it was still investigating the results of the attack. According to Gaza's Hamas-run health ministry, at least 1,168 Palestinians have been killed in Israeli attacks since a ceasefire took effect last October. The UN's human rights office condemned the recent intensification of Israeli military attacks in Gaza.

latest.title: Brazil's Amazon sees sharp decline in size of area burned in 2025
latest.summary: In 2025, the area burned in Brazil's Amazon was significantly smaller than in the previous year, according to MapBiomas. The report indicated that only 3.1 million hectares were burned in 2025, a stark contrast to the 15.8 million hectares burned in 2024.
latest.details: In 2025, the area burned in Brazil's Amazon was significantly smaller than in the previous year, according to MapBiomas. The report indicated that only 3.1 million hectares were burned in 2025, a stark contrast to the 15.8 million hectares burned in 2024. This reduction is seen as a positive development for President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva's re-election campaign. However, experts caution that while the figures are encouraging, they do not yet indicate a definitive trend.
latest.full_brief: In 2025, the area burned in Brazil's Amazon was significantly smaller than in the previous year, according to MapBiomas. The report indicated that only 3.1 million hectares were burned in 2025, a stark contrast to the 15.8 million hectares burned in 2024. This reduction is seen as a positive development for President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva's re-election campaign. However, experts caution that while the figures are encouraging, they do not yet indicate a definitive trend.

latest.title: Watch Texas police officer pull man from burning car
latest.summary: A Texas police officer rescued a man from a burning car during a traffic stop near Dallas. Corporal Joshua Swisher noticed smoke coming from a nearby vehicle and directed it to the emergency lane.
latest.details: A Texas police officer rescued a man from a burning car during a traffic stop near Dallas. Corporal Joshua Swisher noticed smoke coming from a nearby vehicle and directed it to the emergency lane. Shortly after, flames erupted from the car while the driver was still inside. Bodycam footage captured the dramatic rescue, which occurred on June 7.
latest.full_brief: A Texas police officer rescued a man from a burning car during a traffic stop near Dallas. Corporal Joshua Swisher noticed smoke coming from a nearby vehicle and directed it to the emergency lane. Shortly after, flames erupted from the car while the driver was still inside. Bodycam footage captured the dramatic rescue, which occurred on June 7.

latest.title: UK humanitarian worker monitored for Ebola in London hospital
latest.summary: The UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) reported that a UK resident is being monitored for Ebola at a London hospital. The individual has no symptoms and is being assessed as a precautionary measure after working with a humanitarian organization in response to the Ebola outbreak.
latest.details: The UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) reported that a UK resident is being monitored for Ebola at a London hospital. The individual has no symptoms and is being assessed as a precautionary measure after working with a humanitarian organization in response to the Ebola outbreak. The incubation period for Ebola ranges from two to 21 days, during which the individual must isolate. There are currently no confirmed cases of Ebola in the UK.
latest.full_brief: The UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) reported that a UK resident is being monitored for Ebola at a London hospital. The individual has no symptoms and is being assessed as a precautionary measure after working with a humanitarian organization in response to the Ebola outbreak. The incubation period for Ebola ranges from two to 21 days, during which the individual must isolate. There are currently no confirmed cases of Ebola in the UK.

latest.title: Boost youth jobs by cutting employers' national insurance, MPs urge
latest.summary: The Work and Pensions Committee has stated that rising employment costs, including employer National Insurance (NI), are reducing job vacancies for young people. Over one million individuals aged 16 to 24 are classified as not in education, employment, or training (Neet).
latest.details: The Work and Pensions Committee has stated that rising employment costs, including employer National Insurance (NI), are reducing job vacancies for young people. Over one million individuals aged 16 to 24 are classified as not in education, employment, or training (Neet). The committee has proposed cutting employer NI contributions for all under-25s to address this issue. Critics argue that the increase in employer NI has limited job opportunities for young people.
latest.full_brief: The Work and Pensions Committee has stated that rising employment costs, including employer National Insurance (NI), are reducing job vacancies for young people. Over one million individuals aged 16 to 24 are classified as not in education, employment, or training (Neet). The committee has proposed cutting employer NI contributions for all under-25s to address this issue. Critics argue that the increase in employer NI has limited job opportunities for young people.

latest.title: Health worker monitored for Ebola in London hospital after working in DRC
latest.summary: A humanitarian worker is being monitored for potential exposure to the Ebola virus after being evacuated from the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC). The UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) confirmed that the individual is not displaying any symptoms and remains well.
latest.details: A humanitarian worker is being monitored for potential exposure to the Ebola virus after being evacuated from the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC). The UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) confirmed that the individual is not displaying any symptoms and remains well. The worker is being assessed in isolation by infectious disease specialists at a London hospital. The outbreak in the DRC and Uganda was declared a public health emergency of international concern by the World Health Organization.
latest.full_brief: A humanitarian worker is being monitored for potential exposure to the Ebola virus after being evacuated from the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC). The UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) confirmed that the individual is not displaying any symptoms and remains well. The worker is being assessed in isolation by infectious disease specialists at a London hospital. The outbreak in the DRC and Uganda was declared a public health emergency of international concern by the World Health Organization.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
